summary: LeakStop Money-Making Dashboard fully verified. Backend 11/11 pytest passing. Frontend end-to-end (splash → onboarding 3 steps → dashboard → loan/cards/tax screens + paywall) all work on 390x844 mobile viewport. No page errors. All testIDs from the spec resolve correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings only: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' and 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated' from upstream libraries. Non-blocking, but noted.

critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is single-file (~410 lines) — acceptable now, but if more modules are added consider splitting into routers (loan.py, tax.py, cards.py).
store.reset() is invoked when the dashboard profile icon is tapped (testID=reset-btn). This is intentional dev convenience but should probably be a confirmation prompt before launch.
Profile MongoDB doc excludes _id correctly on GET (find_one with projection {_id:0}). Good.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL: https://loan-optimizer-11.preview.emergentagent.com. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL points to same host. All testIDs from spec verified: splash, next-btn, income-input/slider, loan-toggle-{home|car|personal}, loan-block-*, step-analyzing, dashboard-scroll, module-{loan|cards|tax}, lifetime-savings, tenure-slider, extra-slider, check-eligibility-btn, cards-screen, cat-{grocery|travel|fuel|dining}, spend-slider, top-card, apply-card-btn, tax-screen, new-tax/old-tax, tax-cta, paywall-close, plan-monthly/plan-yearly, reset-btn. Sample expected values: refinance(home 35L @9.2%, 240m) => current.emi≈31905, switched.emi=8.4% lower, lifetime saving ≈₹4.29L. tax(15L, 80c=50k, 80d=15k) => new=97500, old=237120, optimal=new.
